block.name: Corrected verification — #190 semgrep false positive rename (Latent token error)
acceptance_criteria: #190: No 'Latent token error' string in any of the three tonic_engine.py files
#190: All three files contain 'Latent generation error'
#190: py_compile passes on all three files

never: Do NOT modify any files — this is a verification-only spec
Do NOT touch any other file
anti_drift: Three grep checks + three compile checks. Nothing else.

steps.description: #190 — Confirm 'Latent token error' is absent from all three tonic_engine.py files

params.command: python3 -c "import sys; files=['/home/josh/NeuroGraph/tonic_engine.py','/home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/tonic_engine.py','/home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/neurograph_work/tonic_engine.py']; bad=[f for f in files if 'Latent token error' in open(f).read()]; assert not bad, f'OLD STRING STILL PRESENT in: {bad}'; print('CONFIRMED: Latent token error absent from all 3 files')"

steps.description: #190 — Confirm 'Latent generation error' is present in all three tonic_engine.py files

params.command: python3 -c "files=['/home/josh/NeuroGraph/tonic_engine.py','/home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/tonic_engine.py','/home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/neurograph_work/tonic_engine.py']; missing=[f for f in files if 'Latent generation error' not in open(f).read()]; assert not missing, f'NEW STRING MISSING from: {missing}'; print('CONFIRMED: Latent generation error present in all 3 files')"

steps.description: #190 — Confirm py_compile passes on all three tonic_engine.py files

params.command: python3 -m py_compile /home/josh/NeuroGraph/tonic_engine.py && python3 -m py_compile /home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/tonic_engine.py && python3 -m py_compile /home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/neurograph_work/tonic_engine.py && python3 -c "print('COMPILE_OK')"

steps.description: Confirm: 'Latent token error' absent from all three tonic_engine.py files (NeuroGraph, Faux_Clawdbot root, Faux_Clawdbot/neurograph/). 'Latent generation error' present in all three. py_compile passes all three. Semgrep false positive #190 resolved.
